cap_ea_agent_setup.name: Executive Assistant Agent Setup
cap_ea_agent_setup.description: Create and configure an Odoo AI agent for executive assistance. Set name, subtitle, system prompt, LLM model, response style, and link to topics.

system_prompt_structure.general_rules: NEVER display errors, ONLY use tools when needed, don't expose internal details
system_prompt_structure.topics_section: Describe each linked topic with its tools, triggers, and example queries
system_prompt_structure.tools_selection: Guidance on when to use each tool category

cap_ea_tool_creation.name: Executive Assistant Tool Creation
cap_ea_tool_creation.description: Create server actions as AI tools for calendar, email, discuss, and activity operations. Each tool runs Python code on the ai.agent model.

standard_tools.name: AI: Find Slots
standard_tools.code_pattern: Find gaps between events on a given date

cap_ea_tool_creation.naming_convention: AI: <Verb> <Noun> (e.g. AI: Create Event, AI: Read Inbox)

cap_ea_topic_config.name: Executive Assistant Topic Configuration
cap_ea_topic_config.description: Create and configure an ai.topic with instructions and linked tools. The topic instructions describe each tool and provide workflow guidance.
tool_linking_steps: 1. Create server actions on ai.agent model with state='code'
2. Set use_in_ai=True on each server action (required by tool_ids domain filter)
3. Create ai.topic with instructions describing each tool
4. Link tools via tool_ids using XML-RPC (MCP does not persist many2many)

workflow_guidelines.meeting_scheduling: Search Partner → Find Available Slots → Create Calendar Event → Confirm
workflow_guidelines.email: Read Inbox (or Search Partner) → Send Email / Send Template → Confirm
workflow_guidelines.discuss: Send Discuss Message with channel_name or partner_ids → Confirm
workflow_guidelines.activities: Create Activity → user completes → Complete Activity with feedback

cap_ea_composer_prompts.name: Executive Assistant Composer & Prompt Buttons
cap_ea_composer_prompts.description: Create ai.composer records to link the agent to UI surfaces (systray, chatter, email) and add prompt buttons for quick actions.

composer_setup.name: Executive Assistant Chat
prompts: Schedule a meeting tomorrow at 10 AM
Draft an email to the team

composer_setup.name: Executive Assistant Help
prompts: Send an email about this record

cap_ea_test_data.name: Executive Assistant Test Data
cap_ea_test_data.description: Create test contacts, calendar events, inbox emails, and discuss channels to validate the agent's tool functionality.
test_data_flow: 1. Create sample contacts (Ahmed, Sarah, Omar) with emails
2. Create calendar events for tomorrow at different times
3. Create mail.message records from different senders as inbox emails
4. Create a discuss channel for channel-based tool testing
